headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 24, 2026**
article:
The Atlanta Braves secured a 7-2 victory over the Washington Nationals, led by Ozzie Albies' impressive performance at the plate. Albies hit 3 home runs and drove in 4 runs. In other action, the Detroit Tigers edged out the Milwaukee Brewers 5-4, with Riley Greene leading the Tigers' offense and Grant Anderson impressing on the mound. The Chicago Cubs secured a thrilling 7-8 win over the Philadelphia Phillies, with Javier Assad earning the win. The San Diego Padres outscored the Colorado Rockies 10-8 in a hard-fought win.

Several players have been impacted by injuries and availability. Baltimore Orioles right-hander Dean Kremer has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right quad strain. The Texas Rangers have placed left-hander Robert Garcia on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder inflammation and left fielder Wyatt Langford on the 10-day injured list due to a right forearm strain. The New York Mets have placed shortstop Francisco Lindor on the 10-day injured list due to a left calf strain. The Atlanta Braves have placed left-hander Dylan Dodd on the 15-day injured list due to left thoracic spine inflammation. The San Diego Padres have transferred right-hander Bryan Hoeing from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to a torn right elbow flexor tendon. The Philadelphia Phillies have transferred right-hander Max Lazar from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to a left oblique strain and placed catcher J.T. Realmuto on the 10-day injured list due to back spasms.

The Chicago Cubs have acquired infielder Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies in exchange for cash. The Houston Astros have traded right-hander Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for shortstop Braden Shewmake. The Los Angeles Dodgers have traded right-hander Axel Perez to the Baltimore Orioles for right-hander Chayce McDermott. The New York Mets have traded left-hander Richard Lovelady to the Washington Nationals for cash.

top_news.title: **Braves Take Down Nationals 7-2**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves secured a 7-2 victory over the Washington Nationals, led by Ozzie Albies' impressive performance at the plate. Albies hit 3 home runs, including a 5th homer of the season, and drove in 4 runs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Brewers in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Milwaukee Brewers 5-4 in a closely contested matchup. Riley Greene led the Tigers' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance, while Grant Anderson impressed on the mound with a strong 0.1 IP outing.

top_news.title: **Cubs Comeback Victory: Phillies Fall 7-8**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs secured a thrilling 7-8 win over the Philadelphia Phillies, with Javier Assad earning the win. Brandon Marsh led the Phillies' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Padres Take Down Rockies in Thrilling 10-8 Victory**
top_news.summary: The San Diego Padres secured a hard-fought win against the Colorado Rockies, outscoring them 10-8. In a standout performance, Mickey Moniak led the Padres' offense with 4 hits, 2 home runs, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Orioles RHP Dean Kremer Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Baltimore Orioles right-hander Dean Kremer has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right quad strain, effective retroactive to April 20, 2026.

top_news.title: **Cubs Acquire Nicky Lopez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago Cubs have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring infielder Nicky Lopez from the Colorado Rockies in exchange for cash. Lopez joins the Cubs after being traded from the Rockies.
